workspace_support.reason: Canonical LoRA Stack owner workspace with full stack and library editing.
Generation workspace can mount and edit the shared LoRA Stack payload; graph execution remains route-matrix gated.

Finish workspace can show the shared LoRA Stack shell, but finish/refine graph insertion is not validated yet.
Results can display LoRA metadata/replay info but must not actively edit the generation graph.
